facts.claim: Your family’s next adventure awaits. Icon of the Seas transforms family vacations with onboard experiences you won’t find anywhere else.
Icon of the Seas is a cruise ship operated by Royal Caribbean International and is the lead ship of the Icon class.
At 248,663 gross tonnage (GT), Icon of the Seas and her sister ships, built by Meyer Turku in Finland, are the largest cruise ships in the world.
